title: Buttery Polish Pancakes
description: Moist and flavorful pancakes made with polish sausage and topped with a pat of butter. A delicious breakfast option.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk and melted Polish sausage.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot with butter and additional Polish sausage if desired.
